sentrux.name: sentrux.free_tier
sentrux.output_path: Sentrux MCP not configured in this session (no mcp__sentrux__ server in claude.ai available servers). Per ADR-042 Addendum 1 §2, the gate workflow accepts skipped status when the MCP is unavailable; CI runs 'sentrux check .' as final enforcement. This change touches no governance, schema, lineage, or runtime paths — it adds an opt-in dead-code child report and one config block.
